commands.review_summary:
This PR caps effective context-token override resolution and session-store persistence by known model context windows, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +91. Total +95 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a positive override returns before model-window lookup, and the PR adds focused tests for the inflated resolver and persisted-session cases.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should explicitly accept the config/session-state semantics change and merge through normal check gates.

target.title: fix: cap session context overrides by model window
target.body:
Summary
- Repair #39859 so explicit context-token overrides cannot inflate the effective window above the selected model's known context limit.
- Keep the patch focused on shared resolver/session accounting and remove unrelated test/CI churn from the branch.
- Leave the broader #58957/#9986 model-switch/fallback product behavior open.

Credit
- Based on @xdanger's source PR #39859 for #39857; this repair preserves that attribution.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/context.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Refs
- Fixes #39857 when the repaired PR lands.
- Related: #58957, #9986, #44303.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-13603-switching-to-a-smaller-context-model-mid-session-causes-hard-cra
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/39859
- Credit: Preserve @xdanger credit for the original implementation idea and source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/39859.; Do not edit CHANGELOG.md for this normal OpenClaw repair; put release-note context in the repaired PR body/commit history.; Do not use #44389 as source work in this repair path because the preflight routes it as security-sensitive.
- Validation: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/context.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
- Repair fallback: GitHub rejected the repair branch push because it updates workflow files and the ClawSweeper app token does not have workflows permission

Inherited issue-closing references from the source PR:
Fixes #39857

Co-author credit kept:
- @xdanger: Co-authored-by: Kros Dai <7087+xdanger@users.noreply.github.com>
